channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Warren Buffett's son Peter didn't know his father was a billionaire until his 20s, discovering it from a rich list
item.description: Peter Buffett, now 68, says he laughed upon seeing his father on the list of America's richest people, and his friends were equally surprised.

item.title: Ex-Applebee's executive told she'd never be CEO bought the chain and fired her critic
item.description: Multimillionaire baby boomer Julia Stewart grew IHOP's business and got back at her former employer after being denied the top role.

item.title: More ships quietly navigate Strait of Hormuz as helicopters deter Iran's fast-attack boats
item.description: To avoid detection by Iran, many ships are turning off their Automatic Identification Systems while sailing through the strait.

item.title: Columbia professor argues 'don't be yourself' at work, calling authenticity overrated
item.description: Tomas Chamorro-Premuzic challenges the value of being yourself in the workplace, especially for leaders.
